name: Never Fail Cake
recipeInstructions: In a large bowl, mix the dry ingredients. Add milk, eggs, and oil, mixing well. Stir in boiling water and vanilla. Pour into a Bundt or tube pan sprayed with Pam. Bake at 350°F for one hour. Use a knife to run around the edge of the pan, then let cool for 15 minutes. Remove from the pan and frost with chocolate frosting.
